tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Mildly elevated ALT may indicate some liver involvement. Lipid profile reveals high LDL, triglycerides, and HDL, indicating dyslipidemia. Globulin is markedly low, which may warrant further evaluation for immunodeficiency or protein loss. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further nephrological and hepatic assessment.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
